content:
Remote Mental Health: Gympass vs Headspace vs Calm 2026

Overview

This comprehensive review compares mental health and wellness tools for remote teams in 2026, analyzing Gympass, Headspace, and Calm. We examine meditation programs, stress management, employee wellness features, and mental health support for distributed organizations supporting remote worker wellbeing.

Platform Comparison

Gympass (now Wellhub)

Gympass provides holistic wellness: Gym and studio access, meditation apps included, wellness challenges, mental health support, nutrition guidance, sleep tracking, corporate wellness programs. Pricing: Corporate pricing varies by plan and user count. Best for organizations wanting comprehensive wellness including physical fitness.

Headspace

Headspace focuses on mindfulness: Guided meditation sessions, sleep sounds and casts, mindful movement exercises, focus music, stress management courses, workplace program. Pricing: Individual $12.99/month, Workplace custom pricing. Excellent for teams prioritizing meditation and mindfulness training.

Calm

Calm emphasizes stress reduction: Meditation library, sleep stories, relaxing music, daily calm sessions, anxiety management, masterclasses, corporate Calm Business. Pricing: Individual $14.99/month, Calm Business custom pricing. Ideal for organizations focusing on stress reduction and sleep improvement.

Remote Mental Health Challenges

Distributed workers face: Isolation and loneliness, stress from remote work, difficulty disconnecting, lack of in-person support, work-life balance issues, anxiety about productivity.

Wellness Features Comparison

Physical wellness: Gympass includes gym access. Meditation: Headspace most comprehensive for mindfulness. Sleep: Calm strongest for sleep support. Stress management: All platforms provide stress relief. Corporate programs: All offer workplace solutions.

Selection Recommendations

For holistic wellness: Gympass for fitness plus mental health. For mindfulness: Headspace for meditation focus. For sleep support: Calm for sleep stories. For stress reduction: Calm for anxiety management. For comprehensive program: Gympass for full wellness suite.
author: Mental Health Expert
